creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Sun Mar 10 21:50:38 2013
New Revision: 313844
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/313844

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.1.3
  
  PR:		ports/176815
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/games/domination/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/games/domination/Makefile
  head/games/domination/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/domination/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/domination/Makefile	Sun Mar 10 21:19:32 2013	(r313843)
+++ head/games/domination/Makefile	Sun Mar 10 21:50:38 2013	(r313844)
@@ -1,8 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	domination
-PORTVERSION=	1.1.1.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.1.3
 CATEGORIES=	games java
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/${PORTNAME:S/d/D/}/${PORTVERSION}/:game  \
 		http://domination.sourceforge.net/maps/
@@ -15,6 +14,8 @@ COMMENT=	Board game that is a bit like t
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOCS
+
 FETCH_ARGS?=	-Fpr
 USE_ZIP=	yes
 USE_JAVA=	yes
@@ -38,13 +39,6 @@ MAPS=		solar bigeurope google europass e
 		sylsia troisdorf wolken castle naerr cow westfalenhalle \
 		union rub gymnasium simpsons_world simpsons germany2
 
-PLIST_FILES=	bin/${PORTNAME}-FlashGUI \
-		bin/${PORTNAME}-Increment1GUI \
-		bin/${PORTNAME}-SimpleGUI \
-		bin/${PORTNAME}-SwingGUI \
-		share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png
-
-PORTDATA=	*
 PORTDOCS=	ChangeLog.txt ReadMe.txt commands.txt todo.txt
 DATADIR=	${JAVASHAREDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 
@@ -53,11 +47,18 @@ SUB_FILES=	${PORTNAME}-FlashGUI \
 		${PORTNAME}-SimpleGUI \
 		${PORTNAME}-SwingGUI
 
-DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Domination" "${COMMENT}" "${PORTNAME}" \
+DESKTOP_ENTRIES="Domination" "${COMMENT}" \
+		"${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png" \
 		"${PORTNAME}-SwingGUI" "Game;StrategyGame;" "false"
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS=""
+.else
+PLIST_SUB+=	PORTDOCS="@comment "
+.endif
+
 post-extract-script:
 .for f in ${MAPS:S/$/.zip/}
 	@${UNZIP_CMD} -qo -d ${WRKSRC}/maps ${DISTDIR}/${DIST_SUBDIR}/${f}
@@ -66,7 +67,7 @@ post-extract-script:
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-* ${PREFIX}/bin
 
-	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
+	@${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "help lib maps resources saves *.jar *.cmd *.htm *.txt *.ini" ${DATADIR})
 	@(cd ${WRKSRC} && ${INSTALL_SCRIPT} *.sh ${DATADIR})
 	@(cd ${DATADIR} && ${CHMOD} 774 saves)

Modified: head/games/domination/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/domination/distinfo	Sun Mar 10 21:19:32 2013	(r313843)
+++ head/games/domination/distinfo	Sun Mar 10 21:50:38 2013	(r313844)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-SHA256 (domination/Domination_1.1.1.2.zip) = edd8eab16d4d66f1365ba7aa1696b536458762962a61423a34b0e3a47b4f94bf
-SIZE (domination/Domination_1.1.1.2.zip) = 5998523
+SHA256 (domination/Domination_1.1.1.3.zip) = 1d390ff9d7f6667179af6d91ce0c7b9f8bcecabc49ea94e74fbe0cc1e38740a2
+SIZE (domination/Domination_1.1.1.3.zip) = 6068074
 SHA256 (domination/solar.zip) = 38345a0921e485ccaf15e15a5ba2bc1281613d139481d0918fc055af653020e9
 SIZE (domination/solar.zip) = 160107
 SHA256 (domination/bigeurope.zip) = 55b574adb11d11ebd084d8b36e93f5b891fc6e69f26e842aa47ab7c9c75ce4d6
